title: Fabricfine
description:
Play java with faster, smoother framerates and quality of life improvments!

Supports many optifine packs!

making new stuff
body:
Optifine like modpack for fabric!

- Supports some optifine texture packs
- Shaders!!!
- Fast chunks!
- Multiple versions supported with more to come!
- All versions get tested!

- Currently supported:
- 1.21.8
- 1.20.1 (Forgefine)
